falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike in volume would suggest a confirmed blowoff top or breakout, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and 'UNKNOWN' phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks below the 2024 August bottom's 38.2% Fibonacci retracement level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a key support failure, invalidating the pattern match to 'bottom_2024_aug' and proving the 'UNKNOWN' verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
